title: Object Instances
description: Instantiate two Car objects and display their information.
problemStatement:
Objects are independent! Create two instances of the `Car` class. Assign `"Tesla"` to the first model and `"Ford"` to the second. Print both model names.

**Expected Output:** 
`Tesla` 
`Ford`
hints: Use the `new` keyword to create an instance: `Car c1 = new Car();`.
